description: The air crackles with static electricity. Shimmering dunes of crystalline sand stretch out before you, glowing with a faint, pulsing blue light. Occasional bolts of lightning arc between the peaks of the dunes.

H.name: Humming Capacitor
H.description: A device that stores massive amounts of static energy. It's vibrating dangerously.

conditions.failMessage: This capacitor is way too dangerous to touch without advanced knowledge of junk-tech. You need to be a Master Tinkerer.

electric_sand.description: Glowing blue sand that crackles with electricity.

sand_path.description: A relatively safe path through the crackling dunes.

item_potato.description: Something is glowing under the sand here... it's a potato! But it's humming with static energy.

warning_sign.description: A metal signpost that emits small sparks. It looks like it was recently hammered into the sand.

dialogue.text: The sign reads: '⚠ OFFICIAL NOTICE FROM BARRY THE BATTERY: Standing is strictly prohibited in this sector. All travelers must find a chair and SIT DOWN immediately to conserve vital energy for the grid (and for me).'
There's a smaller note at the bottom: 'If you are caught standing, you will be considered a rebel and will be force-sat. — B.B.'

exit_west.description: The path leads back to the Breakfastopia Gates.

exit_east.description: The path continues deeper into the humming desert toward a large structure.
